name: Daiichi Koutsu Sangyo Co.,Ltd.
summary: Daiichi Koutsu Sangyo Co.,Ltd. provides passenger transportation services through taxi and bus in Japan. It also engages in the sale and lease of real estate properties, including condominiums, houses, stores, and offices; revitalization of real estate properties; management of condominiums and apartments; operation of auto gas station and hotels; sale of LPG; and provision of car maintenance, visit and home care, nursing care, and elderly housing services. In addition, the company offers real estate backed loans; and radiation shielding products and paints. Further, it is involved in the real estate agency and brokerage, non-life insurance agency, coin parking, golf driving range, mail order, and ship businesses, as well as system and software development, and information communication businesses. Daiichi Koutsu Sangyo Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Kitakyushu, Japan.
